description: Altera Agilex 7 FPGA and SoC FPGA part number model. Fields are ordered as they appear in the part number string. Each field has a fixed length (in characters) and a list of valid options. Options may include a 'when' clause to restrict them based on a prior field selection — this drives conditional filtering in the UI.

fields.label: Family Signature
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Agilex device family.

fields.label: Series
fields.description: Identifies the device series, which determines the available transceiver tiles and memory options.

options.label: F-Series
options.description: General-purpose FPGA with F-Tile, E-Tile, and P-Tile transceiver options.

options.label: I-Series
options.description: Networking-optimized FPGA with F-Tile and R-Tile transceivers.

options.label: M-Series
options.description: FPGA with integrated HBM2e high-bandwidth memory.

fields.label: Fabric Specification
fields.description: Identifies the specific fabric and tile configuration within the selected series.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Three-digit code representing the device logic density (approximate ALM count).

fields.label: Package Code
fields.description: Single letter identifying the package type.

fields.label: Package Size
fields.description: Two-digit code identifying the specific package size (ball count / body dimensions).

options.label: 45mm
options.description: 45mm body, very high pin count package.

fields.label: Tile Speed Grade
fields.description: Performance grade of the transceiver tiles. 1 is fastest, 3 is slowest.

fields.label: Operating Temperature
fields.description: Junction temperature range the device is rated for.

fields.label: Core Speed / Power
fields.description: Performance and power grade of the core fabric. 1 is fastest/highest power, 3 is slowest/lowest power.

fields.label: Suffix
fields.description: Optional suffix providing additional product information. May be omitted.

description: Altera Agilex 5 FPGA and SoC FPGA part number model. Example: A5ED065BB32AE5SR0. Fields are ordered as they appear in the ordering code string.

fields.label: Family Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Agilex 5 device family.

fields.label: Device Type
fields.description: Indicates whether the device is a standalone FPGA or a SoC with integrated hard processor system.

options.label: SoC FPGA
options.description: System-on-Chip with integrated dual-core Arm Cortex-A76 and Cortex-A55 processors.

fields.label: Sub-Series
fields.description: Identifies the sub-series within the Agilex 5 family.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Three-digit code representing the device logic density (approximate K logic elements).

fields.label: Feature Set
fields.description: Identifies the feature tier of the device.

options.label: Enhanced
options.description: Enhanced feature set with additional I/O and transceiver capabilities.

options.label: Premium
options.description: Premium feature set with maximum I/O and transceiver capabilities.

fields.label: Package Code
fields.description: Single letter identifying the package type.

fields.label: Pin Count
fields.description: Two-digit code representing the package body size in mm.

fields.label: Tile Speed Grade
fields.description: Two-character code indicating the transceiver tile performance grade. Higher number = faster.

fields.label: Operating Temperature
fields.description: Temperature grade the device is rated for.

fields.label: Core Speed Grade
fields.description: Single digit indicating core fabric performance. Lower number = higher performance.

fields.label: Suffix
fields.description: Optional suffix for additional product information (e.g., SR0, V). May be omitted.

description: Altera Cyclone V FPGA and SoC FPGA part number model. Format: 5C{sub_family}{density}{package}{pin_count}{speed}N. Example: 5CEFA4F23C8N.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Cyclone V family.

fields.label: Sub-Family
fields.description: Identifies the Cyclone V sub-family and variant.

options.label: Cyclone V E (FA)
options.description: Cyclone V E FPGA, FA variant — logic-optimized with no transceivers.

options.label: Cyclone V E (BA)
options.description: Cyclone V E FPGA, BA variant.

options.label: Cyclone V GX
options.description: Cyclone V GX FPGA with transceiver support.

options.label: Cyclone V GX (B)
options.description: Cyclone V GX FPGA, B variant with transceivers.

options.label: Cyclone V GX (C)
options.description: Cyclone V GX FPGA, C variant with transceivers.

options.label: Cyclone V SX SoC
options.description: Cyclone V SX SoC with ARM Cortex-A9 and transceivers.

options.label: Cyclone V SX SoC (B)
options.description: Cyclone V SX SoC, B variant.

options.label: Cyclone V SX SoC (C)
options.description: Cyclone V SX SoC, C variant.

options.label: Cyclone V SE SoC
options.description: Cyclone V SE SoC with ARM Cortex-A9, no transceivers.

options.label: Cyclone V SE SoC (B)
options.description: Cyclone V SE SoC, B variant.

options.label: Cyclone V ST SoC
options.description: Cyclone V ST SoC with ARM Cortex-A9, standard feature set.

options.label: Cyclone V ST SoC (B)
options.description: Cyclone V ST SoC, B variant.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Device density designator. Represents relative logic capacity within the sub-family.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type and pin count code.

fields.label: Speed Grade
fields.description: Temperature grade letter and speed grade number. Letter indicates temp range, number indicates performance.

fields.label: Trailing N
fields.description: Fixed trailing suffix character.

description: Altera Cyclone 10 LP FPGA part number model. Format: 10CL{density}{package}{pin_count}{speed}{trailing}. Example: 10CL025YU256C8G.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Cyclone 10 LP family.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Three-digit code representing the device logic density in K logic elements.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type code.

fields.label: Pin Count
fields.description: Number of package pins.

fields.label: Speed Grade
fields.description: Temperature grade letter and speed grade number.

fields.label: Trailing
fields.description: Optional trailing suffix character. G indicates lead-free.

description: Altera Cyclone 10 GX FPGA part number model. Format: 10CX{density}{package}{pin_count}{speed}{trailing}. Example: 10CX085YU484I6G.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Cyclone 10 GX family.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Three-digit code representing the device logic density in K logic elements.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type code.

fields.label: Pin Count
fields.description: Number of package pins.

fields.label: Speed Grade
fields.description: Temperature grade letter and speed grade number.

fields.label: Trailing
fields.description: Trailing suffix character indicating lead-free package.

description: Altera MAX 10 FPGA part number model. Format: 10M{density}{feature}{package}{pin_count}{speed}{trailing}. Example: 10M50DAF484C8GES.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the MAX 10 family.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Two-digit code representing the device logic density in K logic elements.

fields.label: Feature
fields.description: Two-character feature code indicating flash configuration and analog capability.

options.label: Dual Analog
options.description: Dual configuration flash with analog (ADC) support.

options.label: Single Analog
options.description: Single configuration flash with analog (ADC) support.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Single-character package type code.

fields.label: Pin Count
fields.description: Number of package pins.

fields.label: Speed Grade
fields.description: Temperature grade letter and speed grade number.

fields.label: Trailing
fields.description: Optional trailing suffix. G indicates lead-free, ES indicates engineering sample.

description: Altera Arria 10 FPGA and SoC FPGA part number model. Format: 10A{sub_family}{density}{feature}{qualifier}{package}{speed}{suffix}. Example: 10AS066N3F40E2SG.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Arria 10 family.

fields.label: Sub-Family
fields.description: Identifies the Arria 10 device variant.

options.label: SX SoC
options.description: Arria 10 SX SoC FPGA with dual-core ARM Cortex-A9.

options.label: GT FPGA
options.description: Arria 10 GT FPGA with high-speed transceivers.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Three-digit code representing the device logic density in K logic elements.

fields.label: Feature
fields.description: Single-character feature/packaging variant code.

fields.label: Qualifier
fields.description: Single-digit routing/packaging qualifier.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type letter and pin count code.

fields.label: Speed / Temperature
fields.description: Two-character speed and temperature grade code. Letter indicates temperature range, digit indicates speed.

fields.label: Suffix
fields.description: Optional trailing suffix for additional product information.

description: Altera Stratix V FPGA part number model. Format: 5S{sub_family}{device_id}{density}{feature}{qualifier}{package}{speed}N. Example: 5SGXEA7N2F45C2N.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Stratix V family.

fields.label: Sub-Family
fields.description: Identifies the Stratix V device variant and transceiver type.

options.label: GX
options.description: Stratix V GX with up to 14.1 Gbps transceivers.

options.label: GT
options.description: Stratix V GT with up to 28.05 Gbps transceivers.

options.label: GS
options.description: Stratix V GS with embedded memory emphasis.

options.label: GS-MD
options.description: Stratix V GS with M20K memory emphasis.

fields.label: Device ID
fields.description: Two-character device designator within the sub-family.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Single-digit density designator within the sub-family.

fields.label: Feature
fields.description: Single-character feature code.

fields.label: Qualifier
fields.description: Single-digit routing variant qualifier.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type and pin count code.

fields.label: Speed Grade
fields.description: Temperature grade letter and speed grade number.

fields.label: Trailing N
fields.description: Fixed trailing suffix character.

description: Altera Stratix 10 FPGA and SoC FPGA part number model. Format: 1S{sub_family}{density}{feature}{qualifier}{package}{speed}{suffix}. Example: 1SX280HU2F50E1VG.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Fixed prefix identifying the Stratix 10 family.

fields.label: Sub-Family
fields.description: Identifies the Stratix 10 device variant.

options.label: SX
options.description: Stratix 10 SX SoC with embedded quad-core ARM Cortex-A53.

options.label: DX
options.description: Stratix 10 DX FPGA with PCIe Gen4 and cache-coherent interconnect.

options.label: TX
options.description: Stratix 10 TX FPGA with 58G PAM4 transceivers.

options.label: MX
options.description: Stratix 10 MX FPGA with integrated HBM2 memory.

fields.label: Density
fields.description: Density code representing the device logic capacity in K logic elements. Variable length.

fields.label: Feature
fields.description: Single-character device/feature variant code.

fields.label: Qualifier
fields.description: Two-character qualifier indicating device revision or routing variant.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type letter and pin count code.

fields.label: Speed / Temperature
fields.description: Two-character speed and temperature grade code.

fields.label: Suffix
fields.description: Optional trailing suffix for additional product information.
